## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Pranav Piyush's company and fwd.digital for content creation and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pranav's company ($1.5M ARR, targeting $10M) needs high-quality, industry-specific content to educate CMOs/CFOs and drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers an AI-assisted, human-in-the-loop approach to content strategy, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [The process involves extensive research, content clustering, and programmatic content generation with human editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Collaboration model allows for varying levels of client involvement in content review and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Topics

### Company Introductions

  - [Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital): Experienced in content programs at IBM, ServiceNow](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Jimmy (GrowthX Labs): Second hire, expert in growth, SEO, and content](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Bruno Santilli (fwd.digital): Marcel's brother, recent addition to the team](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Pranav Piyush: Engineer-turned-marketer, startup founder ($1.5M ARR, tripled last year)](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### Pranav's Company Overview

  - [Sells to CMOs and CFOs at mid-market brands (e.g., Square, Chime, Plaid)](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Current growth vectors: organic social, warm outbound, advisors network, events/communities](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Content focus: LinkedIn, blog, podcast (20+ episodes)](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Goal: Grow from $1.5-2M to $10M ARR this year](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Content Needs and Strategy

  - [Require "core content" - deep, 3000-word thought leadership pieces on industry topics](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [100+ potential topics identified (e.g., attribution models, marketing mix modeling, incrementality testing)](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Aim to educate audience, repurpose for social media, and create landing pages for paid search](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

  - [AI-assisted workflows for faster, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Process: Research → Content strategy → Assignment generation → Execution → Optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Use of proprietary agents and tools for programmatic content planning and creation](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Human editors involved at multiple stages for quality control and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

### Content Creation Process

1.  Initial research and company understanding
2.  Persona and use case identification
3.  Job-to-be-done analysis
4.  Competitive analysis and gap identification
5.  Content clustering and opportunity assessment
6.  Assignment creation and prioritization
7.  Content generation with human editorial oversight
8.  Staging, publishing, and optimization

### Collaboration Model

  - [Weekly meetings and regular check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Calibration process to align on quality and style](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Flexible involvement options for client team in review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Transparent workflow and progress tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Content Types and Approach

  - [Balance between programmatic and editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Recommendation to focus on "planting seeds" with more content, then enriching high-performing pieces](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Ability to handle various content types (e.g., tutorials, programmatic content, drug comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send SOW and add Pranav to Slack channel for direct communication](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Pranav to review additional details, pricing, and make a decision](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Potential kickoff in February if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/xNPgBhsL3W3vVG9TCN1vKYM9oCgDM3yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
